scenario.title: The Test Generator
scenario.context: You have code that needs tests. You want AI to generate comprehensive unit tests that cover edge cases you might miss.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that guides AI to generate thorough unit tests with good coverage of edge cases and failure modes.
constraints: Cover happy path and error cases
scenario.exampleInput: Generate tests for a validateEmail function. It should accept valid emails, reject invalid ones, handle edge cases like empty strings, null, very long emails, unicode characters.
hints: Show the code to be tested

rubric.name: Code Under Test
rubric.description: Is the code to test provided?
